articles.title: 2 Memory Magnates Gain $14 Billion This Year Amid AI Demand Boom
articles.summary: Two memory-product entrepreneurs have seen their fortunes rocket this year thanks to heady demand from AI giants . David Sun, 74, and John Tu, 84, are the cofounders and 50-50 owners of Kingston Technology, a leading maker of computer drives and memory modules. Sun is the California company's operating chief, while Tu is president and CEO. The pair have seen their respective net worths soar by 44%, or nearly $14 billion, since the start of Januar

articles.title: OpenAI resets spend expectations , targets around $600 billion by 2030
articles.summary: OpenAIis telling investors that it's now targeting roughly $600 billion in total compute spend by 2030, months after CEOSam Altmantouted $1.4 trillion in infrastructure commitments. Theartificial intelligencecompany is providing a lower number and more defined timeline for its planned spending, sources told CNBC, as broader concerns mounted that expansion ambitions were too great for the potential revenue that would follow. articles.title: Aircon weather  in Singapore : What behind the rainy , cool week ?
articles.summary: Advertisement Singapore 'Aircon weather' in Singapore: What's behind the rainy, cool week? The heavy rain and cooler temperatures are caused by the ongoing La Nina phase, the Madden-Julian Oscillation and the Northeast Monsoon. People cross a road in heavy rain in Singapore on Mar 3, 2023. articles.title: Afrique de lOuest : Le géant des télécommunications Sonatel enregistre une hauss
articles.summary: La Sonatel, la plus grande entreprise en termes de valeur boursière sur la BRVM, a déclaré un chiffre d'affaires consolidé de 1 923,1 milliards de FCFA (environ 3,47 milliards de dollars) en 2025, en hausse de 8,3 pour cent d'une année sur l'autre. Le résultat net a atteint 413,6 milliards de FCFA (environ 746,6 millions de dollars), soit une augmentation de 5,1 pour cent par rapport à 2024. articles.title: Why Newmont Stock Dropped on Friday | The Motley Fool
articles.summary: Newmont Corporation ( NEM 2.38% ) is the world's largest gold mining company. With the price of gold surging in recent months, you'd expect Newmont to deliver blowout numbers. That's exactly what's happened. Newmont's fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 numbers, released on Feb. 19 after market close, have crushed estimates. articles.summary: Grandes tecnológicas Microsoft pierde un billón de dólares en Bolsa por la inversión en IA y las dudas sobre el crecimiento La acción se deja más de un 27% desde principios de noviembre. articles.title: 3 Signs a Looming Recession Might Trigger a Stock Market Crash , and 1 Potential
articles.summary: There is rarely a clear-cut start and end date to a recession. By the time people realize they are in a recession, it's usually been going on for several months. That's because much of the economic data that investors and consumers rely on is released with a lag.
